User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the Firebase Blank Slate application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

workspaceId.description: The ID of the workspace this user belongs to. Null for super-admins.

phone.description: Contact phone number of the user.

photoURL.description: The URL of the user's profile picture.

role.description: The role of the user, which determines their permissions.

disabled.description: If true, the user is disabled and cannot log in.

Workspace.title: Workspace
Workspace.description: Represents an isolated workspace for a single administrator and their team.

ownerId.description: The ID of the 'administrador' user who owns this workspace.

appName.description: The custom display name for the workspace.

logoUrl.description: The URL for the custom logo of the workspace.

Subscription.title: Subscription
Subscription.description: Defines the subscription details for a workspace.

currentPeriodEnd.description: The date when the current subscription period ends.

Category.title: Category
Category.description: Represents a product category to group items.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Category entity.

description.description: A brief description of the category.

Product.title: Product
Product.description: Represents a product in the inventory.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Product entity.

code.description: A unique, auto-generated code for the product.

barcode.description: The GTIN or EAN barcode of the product.

categoryId.description: Reference to the Category this product belongs to.

supplierId.description: Reference to the Supplier of this product.

price.description: The price per unit of the product.

minStock.description: The minimum stock level for the product.

unit.description: The unit of measurement for the product stock.

isArchived.description: If true, the product is archived and not available for new transactions.

depositIds.description: An array of deposit IDs where this product can be stored.

Deposit.title: Deposit
Deposit.description: Represents a physical location where products are stored (e.g., warehouse, storage room).

id.description: Unique identifier for the Deposit entity.

description.description: A brief description or location details of the deposit.

jefeId.description: Optional reference to the User assigned as the head of this deposit.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Supplier entity.

phone.description: Contact phone number of the supplier.

InventoryStock.title: InventoryStock
InventoryStock.description: Represents the stock of a specific product in a specific deposit. The document ID is a composite key: `${productId}_${depositId}`.

depositId.description: Reference to the Deposit where the stock is located.

quantity.description: The quantity of the product in this stock location.

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp of the last stock update.

StockMovement.title: StockMovement
StockMovement.description: Represents a single stock movement event (remito), which can be an entry or an exit, involving multiple products.

id.description: Unique identifier for the StockMovement document.

remitoNumber.description: A user-defined unique number for the delivery note (remito).

depositId.description: Reference to the Deposit where the movement occurs.

depositName.description: Denormalized name of the deposit for quick display.

actorId.description: Optional reference to the User (for salidas) or Supplier (for entradas).

actorName.description: Denormalized name of the user or supplier.

actorType.description: Specifies if the actor is a user or supplier.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the movement was created.

userId.description: Reference to the User who registered the movement.

items.description: A list of all products and quantities involved in this movement.

totalValue.description: The total monetary value of the movement.

StockMovementItem.title: StockMovementItem
StockMovementItem.description: Represents a single product line within a StockMovement.

RequestItem.title: RequestItem
RequestItem.description: Represents a single item within a product request, used for processing.

Counter.title: Counter
Counter.description: Represents an atomic counter used for generating sequential numbers.

lastNumber.description: The last number that was generated by the counter.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores user profiles. Super-admins are global, other users are scoped to a workspace.

/workspaces/{workspaceId}.description: Stores workspace definitions. Each is owned by an 'administrador' user.

/workspaces/{workspaceId}/categories/{ca.description: Stores product categories for a specific workspace.

/workspaces/{workspaceId}/products/{prod.description: Stores products for a specific workspace.

/workspaces/{workspaceId}/deposits/{depo.description: Stores inventory locations for a specific workspace.

/workspaces/{workspaceId}/suppliers/{sup.description: Stores suppliers for a specific workspace.

/workspaces/{workspaceId}/inventory/{inv.description: Stores stock levels for a specific workspace.

/workspaces/{workspaceId}/stockMovements.description: Stores stock movements for a specific workspace.

/workspaces/{workspaceId}/counters/{coun.description: Stores atomic counters for a specific workspace.
